name: Aloha Stadium Swap Meet
tagline: Hawaii's iconic outdoor flea market with 400+ vendors — relocated to the upper Halawa lot while the new stadium is built.
parking: Park in the lower lot, enter through the Halawa gate. Parking is CASH ONLY
bestTime: Sunday mornings at 6:30am opening for best selection and fewer crowds. Wednesdays are least crowded
kamaaina: Kamaaina/military admission $1 with valid ID (general admission $2). Kids 11 and under free
talkStory: A local institution since the 1970s, the swap meet survived the 2025 demolition of Aloha Stadium by relocating to the upper Halawa parking lot with improvements -- repaved areas, a dedicated food truck section, and a big-top tent with live music. Over 400 vendors sell everything from vintage aloha shirts and local crafts to fresh produce. The same family vendors have held stalls for generations. Sunday 6:30am opening is when serious bargain hunters arrive; Wednesdays are the insider's choice for smallest crowds.
